goal: Complex.from_real(a + b) = Complex.from_real(a) + Complex.from_real(b) and Complex.from_real(a * b) = Complex.from_real(a) * Complex.from_real(b)

Complex.from_real(Real.1) = Complex.1 and forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0 + x1) = Complex.from_real(x0) + Complex.from_real(x1) and Complex.from_real(x0 * x1) = Complex.from_real(x0) * Complex.from_real(x1) }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { Complex.from_real(w0 + k0) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(k0) or Complex.from_real(w0 * k0) != Complex.from_real(w0) * Complex.from_real(k0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(w0 + w1) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(w1) or Complex.from_real(w0 * w1) != Complex.from_real(w0) * Complex.from_real(w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(w0 + w2) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(w2) or Complex.from_real(w0 * w2) != Complex.from_real(w0) * Complex.from_real(w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0 + x1) = Complex.from_real(x0) + Complex.from_real(x1) and Complex.from_real(x0 * x1) = Complex.from_real(x0) * Complex.from_real(x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[Complex, Real](Complex.from_real)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[Real, Complex]) { RingHom.new[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real) = Option.some(k0) }

proof: let w0: Real satisfy { complex_from_real_ring_hom.hom(w0) != Complex.from_real(w0) }

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Real, Complex](complex_from_real_ring_hom, Complex.from_real, w0)
function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0) = is_field_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real)

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { not FieldHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real)

goal: exists(k0: FieldHom[Real, Complex]) { FieldHom.new[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real) = Option.some(k0) }

proof: let w0: Real satisfy { complex_from_real_field_hom.hom(w0) != Complex.from_real(w0) }

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) != FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Real, Complex](complex_from_real_field_hom, Complex.from_real, w0)
